baseline.note: ledger totals that predate canonical lifecycle accounting (accounted explicitly)

reconciliation.scope_note: lifecycle counts are cumulative since canonical accounting began; baseline counts are legacy ledger totals that predate it; ledger/gate totals == baseline + accounted.

learning.note: the bot's own settled-trade experience (calibrated edge model) adjusts the directional probability; it grows as more trades settle. The execution-quality gate, paper-realism, and reconciliation are unchanged and still veto every trade — learning can never bypass them.

last_note.summary: DOWN signals (esp. DOWN_STRONG, range_bottom, dead volume, sell_pressure CVD) show win-rates 0.60-0.79 with positive EV after cost on n>=14 samples while UP and short-hold (<60s) buckets remain negative-EV despite similar nominal win-rates. Overall book is still slightly negative (-12 USD) but avg_ev_after_cost stays positive (~0.10) across 145 trades, confirming selectivity is working yet edge is modest. No prior analysis supplied so all observations are baseline.
warnings: total sample still modest (145); many buckets near n=8-20 boundary
observe_only mode means no live execution risk but also no real slippage data
positive avg_ev but realized pnl negative implies cost or sizing assumptions may be optimistic
focus_next: accumulate more DOWN_WEAK / range_bottom / dead-volume samples
track whether DOWN_STRONG win-rate holds above 0.58 with n>100
monitor UP vs DOWN divergence as n grows

history.summary: DOWN signals (esp. DOWN_STRONG, n=74) show confirmed edge with WR 0.608 and positive EV after costs; range_bottom (n=42, WR 0.786) and -1..1 z-score (n=100, WR 0.61) buckets also confirmed profitable with sufficient samples and positive realized PnL. UP direction, <60s TTC, and volume_spike remain clear losers with negative EV. Sample of 145 is still modest so most sub-buckets stay noisy.
changes_since_last: first analysis, no prior; sample grew to 145 settled trades with DOWN bias now statistically clearer

history.summary: DOWN direction signals (esp. DOWN_STRONG, n=74, WR=0.608) show confirmed edge with WR above breakeven and positive avg_ev_after_cost across 145 total trades; range_bottom (n=42, WR=0.786) and dead volume (n=58, WR=0.638) buckets are also confirmed profitable while UP, short TTC<60s, and volume_spike remain failing. Overall sample still small with mixed realized pnl despite positive EV metrics; no material change detectable without prior_analysis.

DOWN signals (esp. DOWN_STRONG, n=99/74) show confirmed edge with wr 0.616/0.608, positive pnl and EV>0.10 after costs at n>>8; range_bottom (wr 0.786 n=42), dead volume (wr 0.638 n=58) and sell_pressure CVD (wr 0.786 n=14) also confirmed profitable while UP, short-TTC and volume-spike buckets remain reliably negative.

DOWN signals (esp. DOWN_STRONG n=74, DOWN_WEAK n=25) show win-rates 0.61-0.64 with positive avg_ev_after_cost ~0.103 and sufficient samples, while UP signals remain near or below breakeven with negative realized pnl. Trending regime (n=135), dead volume, range_bottom, and bearish supertrend buckets meet confirmation thresholds; most other slices (z-score extremes, short ttc, volume spike) are either n<8 or show inconsistent EV vs realized pnl. Overall sample of 145 trades still too small for broad generalization.

DOWN signals (esp. DOWN_STRONG, n=99/74) show confirmed edge with wr 0.61+ and positive pnl after costs in n>=8 buckets; range_bottom (wr 0.786, +70 pnl), dead volume, lower/upper wick rejection, sell_pressure cvd, and bearish supertrend/mtf alignment also confirmed profitable. UP side, short ttc<60s, volume spikes, and 1..2 zscore buckets remain negative or noisy with insufficient confirmation. Sample growth to 145 trades strengthens selectivity on DOWN/trending/-1..1 zscore but total pnl still mixed due to UP drag.

DOWN signals, especially DOWN_STRONG and DOWN_WEAK, show confirmed positive EV (avg_ev_after_cost ~0.103) with win rates 0.61-0.64 above likely breakeven and n>20; range_bottom and dead volume states also confirm strong selectivity with win rates 0.79/0.64 and positive pnl. UP direction, volume_spike, and <60s TTC remain failing with negative realized pnl and sub-breakeven performance despite positive modeled EV. Sample growth to 145 settled trades strengthens DOWN edge in trending/htf_bearish regimes while exposing overfit risk in low-n buckets like noise regime.

DOWN direction (esp. DOWN_STRONG n=74 and DOWN_WEAK n=25) shows confirmed edge with win-rates 0.61-0.64 above breakeven, positive EV after costs, and sufficient samples; range_bottom (n=42, WR 0.786) and dead-volume (n=58, WR 0.638) buckets also confirmed profitable while UP direction and volume-spike remain reliably negative. Most other regime/z-score/HTF buckets still too small (n<8) or mixed to confirm. No material change from prior as this is first structured view; bot should continue observing only.

DOWN signals (esp. DOWN_STRONG, range_bottom, dead volume, sell_pressure CVD) show win-rates 0.60-0.79 with positive EV after cost on n>=14 samples while UP and short-hold (<60s) buckets remain negative-EV despite similar nominal win-rates. Overall book is still slightly negative (-12 USD) but avg_ev_after_cost stays positive (~0.10) across 145 trades, confirming selectivity is working yet edge is modest. No prior analysis supplied so all observations are baseline.

analyst_A.note: observe-only Grok research analyst that LEARNS the bot's trading patterns from its growing settled-trade/selectivity/late-window evidence and refines across cycles (continuity). Diagnostics only — never trades.

predictor_B.note: observe-only Grok P(up) per signal; graded vs realized BTC move before it could ever be trusted; never places/sizes/bypasses a trade.

grok_signal_intel.note: A analyzes signal-learning performance; B predicts P(up) per signal and is graded vs realized moves. Both observe-only — never place/size/bypass a trade; the execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

aggression.note: loosens (more explore/looser exploit/larger size) as acted trades profit; tightens on losses; circuit breaker is the hard floor.

grok_decider.note: Grok decides; bot executes (paper). shadow=decide+grade only (no trade), follow=engine follows direction/size subject to the deterministic floor (execution realism, risk caps, freshness). Fail-closed -> no_trade.

headlines: Bitcoin tests 2-week low near $62K amid tech sell-off and risk-off sentiment
Live markets: bitcoin drops to $62,000 as gold falls below $4,000

verifier.note: independent Claude maker-checker; can only veto/shrink a Grok-proposed paper trade, never force one; fail-open; PAPER ONLY.

last_note.summary: 403 settled trades, 53.6% win rate, -$64.81 PnL, 0.89 profit factor. Loses more per loss than wins per win, bleeding slowly. TradingView DOWN signals show 61.6% hit rate (vs 42.3% baseline UP rate), suggesting directional edge for shorts, but overall execution costs and adverse selection erase it.

knob_recommendations.reason: Filter to strong DOWN signals only (current 0.82 worked); reject weak/UP
55 wide_spread rejects; tighten from current to avoid adverse fills
95 underdog_price_below_floor rejects; raise floor to capture better UP prices if trading UP at all
Reduce from $5 to limit drawdown while testing directional filter

new_lessons.rule: TradingView DOWN signals hit 61.6% vs 42.3% base rate; exploit DOWN only, avoid UP
Avg loss $4.02 > avg win $3.09; execution slippage or adverse selection on losses
11 no-signal trades: 36.4% win, -$4.94 PnL; never trade without TradingView signal
Brier 0.226 vs baseline 0.25, but profit factor 0.89; model directionally OK, execution poor
Execution gate correctly blocking 89 trades post-slippage; spread/depth model working

research_loop.note: strategy-layer research meta-loop: independent model proposes exploit/avoid contexts + bounded knob nudges + lessons. Observe-only unless auto_apply (whitelisted+bounded). PAPER ONLY.

recent.rule: 89 negative-EV + 95 underdog-floor rejections prove gate prevents bad trades; maintain strict thresholds, no loosening
1-min signals (n=17, 58.8%) vs 5-min (n=128, 57.0%) show no material difference; consolidate to 5-min to reduce noise
Bucket 0.3-0.4 shows 28.2% empirical_up (n=39) vs 35% expected; model overestimates UP in low-confidence zone—recalibrate or avoid
DOWN trades show 61.6% TradingView signal hit vs 47.8% UP; favor DOWN in signal alignment scoring
0.3-0.4 confidence bucket shows 28.2% empirical vs 35% expected; recalibrate or avoid this bucket
245/603 (41%) execution candidates rejected; underdog_price_below_floor (95) and negative_ev (89) dominate—review pricing logic
Avg loss $4.02 vs win $3.09 (30% larger); tighten stops or raise entry bar to fix asymmetry
TradingView DOWN signals hit 61.6% vs 42.3% baseline; UP signals 47.8% (below baseline)—use directionally
TradingView DOWN signals hit 61.6% vs 42.3% base rate; exploit DOWN only, avoid UP
11 no-signal trades: 36.4% win, -$4.94 PnL; never trade without TradingView signal
Brier 0.226 vs baseline 0.25, but profit factor 0.89; model directionally OK, execution poor
Execution gate correctly blocking 89 trades post-slippage; spread/depth model working

loops.note: formalized sub-loops (data/signal/verify/execute/risk/research/news/lessons); each has a trigger + skill + verifier + verifiable stop + a liveness watchdog (last_beat_age_s/stalled). PAPER ONLY.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

cex_lead_edge.promotion_rule: n>=min AND wilson_lower(win_rate)>breakeven AND Brier_cex<Brier_market AND avg_pnl>0
cex_lead_edge.note: CEX-lead latency edge; benchmark is the MARKET price (already ~0.21 Brier). SHADOW grades only; GATED can PROPOSE a side on a proven bucket but the execution-quality gate + safety floor remain authoritative. PAPER ONLY.

arbitrage.note: risk-free dutch book (up_vwap+down_vwap<1-fees-eps); deterministic P&L; NEVER blended into directional win-rate/profit-factor. PAPER ONLY.

learned_selectivity_gate.note: rejects ONLY buckets confidently below their own breakeven win-rate (Wilson upper bound < breakeven AND net-negative PnL); coin-flip / not-significant buckets are NOT rejected. Can only make the bot MORE selective — never trades, resizes, or bypasses the execution gate. Exploration tracked separately.

counterfactual.note: in-sample replay using final accumulated bucket evidence (diagnostic estimate)

gate.note: when enabled, only late-window AND high-conviction setups may trade; can only PREVENT trades, never force/size/bypass the execution gate.

edge_measurement.note: observe-only: grades whether late-window high-conviction trades win more (cohort vs other) from live settled trades; never affects trading.

tradingview_latest_signal.indicator_name: Hermes BTC Pulse Composite v4 Orderflow Loose

BTCUSD.indicator_name: Hermes BTC Pulse Composite v4 Orderflow Loose

tradingview.note: TradingView alerts are candidate signals only — they cannot place, resize, or bypass trades; the strategy + execution gate remain the sole trade authority.

edge_vs_5min_outcome.note: observe-only: did the TradingView signal at entry predict the 5-min Chainlink outcome (signal_hit_rate vs baseline_up_rate), and did aligning help the bot win (aligned vs opposed bot_win_rate)? Never affects trading.

rsi_trend.note: observe-only: learns P(next 5-min outcome | RSI alert trend state) from the alert history and scores its own next-window predictions. Never trades.

best_buckets.bucket: Hermes BTC Pulse Composite v3 Loose

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

signal_gate.note: when active, a paper trade is taken only if a fresh TradingView signal agrees with the side; it can only PREVENT trades, never force or bypass them.

context_gate.note: hard prior gate: blocks proven-losing entry contexts (volume spikes, noise regime, far-from-resolution) before enough samples exist for the learned selectivity gate. Can only PREVENT trades — never forces, sizes, or bypasses the execution gate, which remains the sole trade authority.
